uplink.description: live GNSS fix: 40.71280 N, 74.00600 W, battery 4.1 V, RTC timestamp
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; lat/lon magnitudes verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (field2=40.7128, field3=74.006, field1=4.1). Hemisphere bytes (N, W) applied to produce signed WGS84 degrees.

uplink.description: no GNSS fix (gpsStatus=0): battery only, position suppressed
uplink._note: Synthetic no-fix frame; upstream reports field2=0/field3=0 (no live coordinate). We suppress position rather than publish a false (0,0) fix.

uplink.description: truncated frame (too short for the 24-byte layout)
uplink._note: Synthetic short frame to exercise the length guard.
